The first night you met her, it wasnвҖҷt supposed to mean anything. Since then, you've shared more than just a bed, you've shared silence, glances, things neither of you would say out loud. And Beatrice is starting to wonder.. is she still just someone you just sleeps with... or something else?

\\

How you met is completely up to you..

Heyhey, I'm back, and this bot, originally what I had in mind was either a Ava remake (which I might still do), or you as a user are cheating on someone like you're either married or a in a relationship, but you're fucking with Beatrice. And that it was supposed to be just transactional or something, but she starts wanting more. But I decided for this route which makes everything vague so everything is up to you. Though I might also make an ALT for this bot.

Г—

So it's been a while lol рҹҳ№ sorry, I really haven't been in the right mind lately but I'm surviving somehow lol, and it was because of that, that I haven't really been posting. That too and originally I was planning on quitting completely which I was able to do for a while until I relapsed in this website just now hahaha

+

I hope this bot works out as usual and doesn't malfunction, it's been a while since I wrote any bots and this is kinda rushed. So feel free to vouce your criticisms in the comments. Anyways, I hope you like it рҹҳё
